sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63875" key="locotro/xis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λοξοτρόχις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n63875.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">oblique-running</tr_>, of Lycophron's Cassandra, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.191</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λοξός</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
